name: Edam-Volendam (Netherlands)
description: A white field bearing the municipal shield logo and the name 'Gemeente Edam-Volendam'.
history: Flag of the municipality of Edam-Volendam in the province of North Holland, formed in 2016. The flag is the municipality's logo/wordmark banner rather than a heraldic design.

features.role: the municipal shield logo and wordmark 'Gemeente Edam-Volendam'
